ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "identifier" TEXT /* Identifier for the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the product */,
  "qty" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the product (e.g., piece, box, kg) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "product_hierarchy" TEXT /* Hierarchical relationship of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum storage capacity of the warehouse */,
  "current_occupancy" INTEGER /* Current storage usage of the warehouse */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager assigned to the warehouse */,
  "security_level" TEXT /* Security level of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouses_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory movement */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being tracked */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "qty" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product moved */,
  "movement_date" TEXT /* Date when the inventory movement occurred */,
  "movement_type" TEXT /* Type of inventory movement */,
  "source_warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source warehouse in case of transfer */,
  "destination_warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination warehouse in case of transfer */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the movement */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the movement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_destination_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_source_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "qty" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the order */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Quantity of the product in stock

Contact email for inquiries about the warehouse
